steps.t: Erchar can be found in Linhir. The Corsairs and Haradrim are attacking Linhir. You should speak to Erchar and defend the city.
Erchar can be found in Linhir. You have broken the first assault and should now speak to Erchar.
Herion can be found in central Linhir, overlooking the Gilrain. You have found Herion amidst the battle and should now speak to him.
Erchar can be found in central Linhir. You have defeated the invaders and beaten back the attack, but at great cost. You should speak to Erchar.
